About Me

I'm Aldous, a Computer Science student passionate about building modern web applications, UI/UX designs, and multimedia content.

I enjoy creating clean, user-friendly interfaces and solving real-world problems through code and design.

Web Development UI/UX Design Video Editing Photo Editing Problem Solving
